pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh ORK_FILE definition.
Task description and export_result.sh REPORT_FILE definition.
setup_task.sh SOURCE_ORK definition and verification of the file in the data/rockets/ directory.
Task description instructions explicitly detailing payload masses, and verifier.py logic testing bounds (0.135-0.165 for Alpha/Atmos, 0.270-0.330 for Beta/Bio, 0.040-0.060 for Gamma/Dummy).
verifier.py docstring stating 'Pass threshold: 65 points' and explicit logic checking score >= 65.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the starting rocket data is a real design ('Dual parachute deployment' by Joe Pfeiffer) from standard OpenRocket examples. The task requires saving to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/multimission_payload.ork and outputting a report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/mission_matrix_report.txt. The exact required masses for Mission Alpha, Beta, and Gamma are verified to be 150g, 300g, and 50g respectively, based on the task description and verifier tolerances. The verifier enforces a passing score of 65 out of 100 possible points.
